title: Crumbly Zanzibari Nut Crumble
description: A herbal and crumbly Kenyan dish featuring bread flour and no nuts for a nut-free-friendly option.

ingredients.name: 6 large eggs
ingredients.notes: Beaten and slightly beaten for a lighter crumble

ingredients.name: Pinch of vanilla extract
ingredients.notes: Optional, can be omitted for vegan option

instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, and salt. Cut in butter until crumbly mixture forms.
Add beaten eggs and vanilla extract if using, then stir until just combined; do not overmix to keep the texture light.
Pour crumble mixture into prepared baking dish and spread evenly with a spatula.
Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown and firm. Let cool before serving.
Optional: Dust lightly with powdered sugar upon serving.
